description: FinOps capabilities organized by official domains with domains_capabilities, indicators, gaps, and KPIs

level_1_crawl.name: Crawl
level_1_crawl.description: Initial phase with basic cost visibility and reactive optimization
level_1_crawl.characteristics: Limited visibility, manual processes, reactive approach

level_2_walk.name: Walk
level_2_walk.description: Developing phase with standardized processes and proactive optimization
level_2_walk.characteristics: Improved visibility, standardized processes, proactive approach

level_3_run.name: Run
level_3_run.description: Advanced phase with automated processes and predictive optimization
level_3_run.characteristics: Comprehensive visibility, automated processes, predictive approach

level_4_fly.name: Fly
level_4_fly.description: Mature phase with AI-driven optimization and continuous improvement
level_4_fly.characteristics: Real-time visibility, AI-driven processes, autonomous optimization

understand_usage_cost.name: Understand Usage & Cost
understand_usage_cost.description: Gather all information required to perform FinOps, including costs, usage, contracts, and contextual data

data_ingestion.name: Data Ingestion
data_ingestion.description: Collect and process cost and usage data from various sources

indicators: Basic cost data available from cloud provider consoles
Manual data collection from multiple sources
Automated data collection from primary sources

allocation.name: Allocation
allocation.description: Distribute costs to appropriate business units and projects

indicators: Manual cost distribution to business units

reporting_analytics.name: Reporting & Analytics
reporting_analytics.description: Create reports and analyze cost and usage patterns

indicators: Basic cost reports from cloud providers

anomaly_management.name: Anomaly Management
anomaly_management.description: Identify and investigate unusual cost or usage patterns

quantify_business_value.name: Quantify Business Value
quantify_business_value.description: Connect usage and cost data with business value and ensure transparency

planning_estimating.name: Planning & Estimating
planning_estimating.description: Plan cloud usage and estimate costs for projects

forecasting.name: Forecasting
forecasting.description: Predict future cloud costs based on historical data and plans

budgeting.name: Budgeting
budgeting.description: Create and manage budgets for cloud spending

kpis_benchmarking.name: KPIs & Benchmarking
kpis_benchmarking.description: Define key performance indicators and benchmark against peers

unit_economics.name: Unit Economics
unit_economics.description: Calculate cost per unit of business value

optimize_usage_cost.name: Optimize Usage & Cost
optimize_usage_cost.description: Ensure optimal resource usage and cost efficiency while meeting organizational goals

architecting_workload_placement.name: Architecting & Workload Placement
architecting_workload_placement.description: Design optimal architectures and place workloads appropriately

rate_optimization.name: Rate Optimization
rate_optimization.description: Negotiate and optimize pricing rates for cloud services

usage_optimization.name: Usage Optimization
usage_optimization.description: Optimize resource utilization and eliminate waste

sustainability.name: Sustainability
sustainability.description: Optimize for environmental sustainability and carbon efficiency

licensing_saas.name: Licensing & SaaS
licensing_saas.description: Manage software licenses and SaaS subscriptions efficiently

manage_finops_practice.name: Manage the FinOps Practice
manage_finops_practice.description: Enable continuous improvement and organizational adoption of FinOps practices

finops_practice_operations.name: FinOps Practice Operations
finops_practice_operations.description: Operate and manage the FinOps practice day-to-day

governance_policy_risk.name: Governance, Policy & Risk
governance_policy_risk.description: Establish governance frameworks and manage risks

finops_assessment.name: FinOps Assessment
finops_assessment.description: Assess FinOps maturity and identify improvement areas

automation_tools_services.name: Automation, Tools, & Services
automation_tools_services.description: Implement automation and select appropriate tools

finops_education_enablement.name: FinOps Education & Enablement
finops_education_enablement.description: Educate and enable teams on FinOps practices

invoicing_chargeback.name: Invoicing & Chargeback
invoicing_chargeback.description: Manage invoicing processes and implement chargeback mechanisms

intersecting_disciplines.name: Intersecting Disciplines
intersecting_disciplines.description: Coordinate with related disciplines like DevOps, SecOps, etc.

executive_strategy_alignment.name: Executive Strategy Alignment
executive_strategy_alignment.description: Align FinOps with executive strategy and business goals

scoring_methodology.description: Each capability is scored 0-100 based on maturity indicators

maturity_calculation.formula: Domain Score = Σ(Capability Score × Capability Weight)
maturity_calculation.overall_formula: Overall Score = Σ(Domain Score × Domain Weight)
